description: A portrait-format graphic built on a darkened close-up photograph of a young adult man with short dark hair looking at the camera. A brand mark reading FOX NEWS sits centered over the lower portion, with large white headline text below it reading Illegal alien accused of killing dad, trying to flee after drunken crash - feds rip Biden-era release. A small Department of Homeland Security seal appears at the bottom.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Illegal alien accused of killing dad, trying to flee after drunken crash - feds rip Biden-era release
